options.content:
## Profile And Account Management
Business-event panels in this dashboard are backed by the custom telemetry events emitted for the authenticated profile flows.

### Queryable business events today
- `ProfileUpdateCompleted`
- `ProfileUpdateFailed`
- `AvatarUploadCompleted`
- `AvatarUploadFailed`

panels.title: Profile HTTP Status Codes Over Time

options.content:
## Profile SLO Targets
- Profile update success rate: >= 99% over 30 minutes.
- Avatar upload success rate: >= 98% over 30 minutes.
- Profile endpoint 5xx rate: < 1% over 10 minutes.
- Profile endpoint p95 latency: < 500 ms over 10 minutes.
